name: Zhejiang Sanhua Intelligent Controls Co.,Ltd
summary: Zhejiang Sanhua Intelligent Controls Co.,Ltd. engages in the research, manufacture, sale, and service of HVAC&R controls and components in China and internationally. The company offers refrigeration control components, automotive air conditioning, thermal management system components, coffee machine, dishwasher parts, etc. Its product includes valve, four-way reversing valve, electronic expansion valve, solenoid valve, controller, micro channel heat exchanger, home appliance heat pump control system part, pump, heating pipe, and water softening system and divider, as well as electronic water and oil pump, electronic water valve, water cooling plate, thermostatic valve, thermal expansion valve, liquid receiver, automatic air conditioner controller, etc. The company's products are used in household and commercial air conditioners, food chain retailers, and heat management and pump systems. Zhejiang Sanhua Intelligent Controls Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shaoxing, China.
